subject: feat(foundation): implement Phase 1 frontend with React + TypeScript + Tailwind
body:
Complete Phase 1 (Foundation) frontend for Sancio agreement builder.
Frontend-only with mock data and localStorage persistence, designed
for clean swap to Supabase backend when ready.

What's included:
- Vite + React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS v4 + PWA scaffold
- Shared type definitions (Project, Agreement, Module, User)
- Reusable component library (Button, Input, TextArea, Modal, EmptyState, etc.)
- Mock auth with AuthContext + localStorage
- CRUD hooks (useProjects, useAgreements, useModules) with localStorage
- 6 starter module templates
- All pages: Login, ProjectList, ProjectDetail, AgreementDetail, ModuleEditor, 404
- React Router v7 with protected routes and breadcrumbs
- Module reorder (up/down), inline editing, delete confirmations
- Product definition saved as docs/PRODUCT_DEFINITION.md
- Backend spec started as docs/BACKEND_SPEC.md

Tags: foundation, frontend, react, typescript, tailwind, pwa, scaffold
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: phase-1-foundation
Semver: minor
